center.id: loc-喬瓦尼-安東尼奧-斯科波利-63de771d
center.name: 喬瓦尼·安東尼奧·斯科波利
center.summary: 喬瓦尼·安東尼奧·斯科波利是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Seychelles blue pigeon、西仓鸮、黑兀鹫等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.evidence: The Papuan eclectus, red-sided eclectus, or New Guinea eclectus (Eclectus polychloros) is a parrot species which is native to New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Seychelles blue pigeon (Alectroenas pulcherrimus), also known as the Seychelles blue fruit dove, is a medium-sized pigeon which inhabits woodland areas of the granitic Seychelles archipelago

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: temminckii from Pangolakha Wildlife Sanctuary, Sikkim | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Myophonus | species = caeruleus | authority = (Scopoli, 1786) | synonyms = }} The blue whistling thrush (Myophonus caeruleus) is a bird in the Old World flycatchers family Muscicapidae that is found in the mountains of Central Asia, South Asia, China and Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-billed leiothrix (Leiothrix lutea) is a member of the family Leiothrichidae, native to southern China and the Himalayas
